name: You're in The Zombie Apocalypse. (Apocalypse RPG)
description:
Welcome to Zombie Apocalypse RPG!
Step into a world where crumbling cities lie abandoned, the remnants of civilization decay, and governments have fallen, leaving the relentless hordes of the undead as the ruling force. Forge your own path in this post-apocalyptic wasteland. Will you survive as a lone wanderer, a ruthless raider with no mercy, or a heroic figure striving to restore hope?
Bring your story to life by creating a persona with a brief backstory to immerse yourself in the chaos. The fate of this world is in your hands. Who will you become?

If you run into any issues, or have any suggestions, feel free to let me know in the reviews and I'll update it. <3 <3
creator: Rottenfeline
